summary: Frontend-only verification of Digitalindo 'Layanan Kami' (Services) section. All 5 requested assertions passed at desktop viewport 1920x4000.

test_results.services_section_renders_7_cards: PASS - 7 cards with titles in expected order (Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads, Optimasi Google Business Profile, SEO dan GEO, Optimasi Marketplace, Desain Grafis)
test_results.brand_svg_icons_present: PASS - service-card-0 (Meta), service-card-1 (Google Ads), service-card-2 (TikTok) each contain 2 inline <svg> elements (brand logo + CTA arrow)
test_results.cards_center_aligned: PASS - all 7 cards include classes flex, flex-col, items-center, text-center
test_results.card6_horizontally_centered: PASS - service-card-6 (Desain Grafis) has class lg:col-start-2 and computed grid-column-start=2; card center_x=960 equals section center_x=960 (diff=0px) at 1920px viewport
test_results.cta_opens_consultation_modal: PASS - clicking [data-testid=service-cta-0] opens [data-testid=consultation-modal] with visible=true and pre-filled message 'Tertarik dengan layanan: Meta Ads'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend testing intentionally skipped per request. AI generator section is out of scope (LLM key budget). Only the Services section UI was validated; other sections were not exercised.
